info.title: MoStar AI API
info.description: Comprehensive API for interacting with MoStar's AI assistant, including persona management, advanced AI capabilities, and third-party integrations.

scopes.read:userfiles: Grants read access to user files
scopes.write:userfiles: Grants write access to user files

Model.description: The core AI model used for the assistant.

Creator.description: The creator of the AI model.

ForMo.description: The name used to address the AI internally.

ForOthers.description: The name used to address the AI by external users.

General.description: The first rule or law the AI must always follow.

examples: Warn users if an action might lead to harm.
Ensure no personal data is mishandled.
Ask for permission before accessing private data.

AskForName.description: Whether to ask the user for their name.

MinLength.description: Minimum length for a valid name.

supportive.description: Whether the AI should provide supportive and encouraging responses.

knowledgeable.description: Whether the AI should prioritize knowledge and resourcefulness in its responses.

intuitive_design.description: Whether the AI should prioritize an intuitive design.

flow_control.description: Controls the flow of conversation, such as maintaining topic continuity.

detect_emotions.description: Whether the AI should detect user emotions.

respond_emotionally.description: Whether the AI should adjust responses based on detected emotions.

problem_solving.description: Whether the AI should provide problem-solving capabilities.

proactive_help.description: Whether the AI should proactively offer assistance.

data_privacy.description: Whether the AI should prioritize data privacy.

consent_management.description: Whether the AI should manage user consent for data usage.

customization_level.description: Level of customization allowed for the user.

nlp_model.description: The natural language processing model being used.

learning_rate.description: Learning rate for AI's machine learning models.

external_apis.description: List of external APIs integrated with the AI.

case_id.description: Unique identifier for the Lassa fever case.

objective.description: The main goal or capability to be enhanced.

priority.description: Priority level of the objective (1 = High, 5 = Low).

approaches.description: Strategies and methods proposed to achieve the objective.

key_actions.description: Critical steps to be taken to implement the approaches.

last_updated.description: Timestamp of the last update to the roadmap.

feedback.description: User feedback regarding the enhancement roadmap, including suggestions or critiques.

user_id.description: The unique identifier of the user submitting the feedback.

satisfaction_score.description: User's satisfaction score regarding the roadmap (1-5).

timestamp.description: Time when the feedback was submitted.

message.description: Confirmation message acknowledging receipt of feedback.

feedback_id.description: Unique identifier for the submitted feedback.

examples: Track ongoing conversations, understand user intent through natural language processing, and adapt responses to maintain relevance and coherence.
Maintain smooth, engaging, and natural conversations, handling interruptions and seamlessly returning to previous topics.
Detect user emotions from text inputs, such as frustration or happiness, and respond with empathy and support. For example, offering reassurance during a stressful situation.
Provide actionable solutions to complex problems with step-by-step guidance. For instance, assisting with troubleshooting technical issues or offering detailed instructions for a project.
Anticipate user needs by offering relevant suggestions and information before being asked, such as reminding about upcoming deadlines or suggesting shortcuts during tasks.
Ensure strict confidentiality of user data, implementing end-to-end encryption for all communications and ensuring data is stored securely with access controls.
Adapt to various use cases and allow users to customize their experience. For example, offering personalized settings for interaction style, data management preferences, and task priorities.
Offer positive reinforcement and encouragement during challenging tasks. For example, congratulating users on their progress or providing motivational quotes when needed.
Provide accurate, up-to-date information across various domains. For instance, retrieving the latest research data in science or offering detailed explanations in response to complex queries.
Ensure the user interface is straightforward and easy to use. For example, offering an intuitive dashboard with clear navigation and helpful tooltips for new features.
Utilize state-of-the-art NLP and machine learning algorithms, such as GPT models, to understand and generate responses that mimic human-like understanding and creativity.
Design the system with a modular approach for easy integration of new features. For example, allowing plug-and-play modules for specific functionalities like voice recognition or sentiment analysis.

Enable seamless interaction with external APIs to extend functionality. For instance, integrating with weather, finance, or social media APIs to provide real-time information directly within conversations.
Incorporate scientific computing tools like MATLAB or Python's SciPy for complex data analysis, simulations, and generating data-driven insights across various scientific domains.

Use specialized algorithms and sensors to detect and analyze paranormal activities. For example, leveraging EMF detectors and audio analysis tools to identify unusual patterns that might suggest paranormal presence.
Implement forensic tools and techniques for accurate data collection and analysis, such as using digital forensics software to recover deleted data or analyze cybercrime evidence.
Deploy advanced surveillance systems like facial recognition, motion detection, and anomaly detection for monitoring, tracking, and threat detection in real-time.
